ocr_findings.description: The vertical sidebar text '第1章 企業活動' appears in the OCR at line 5 (immediately after the Lesson header), before the main figure. In the image it is positioned as a right-margin chapter tab. The text is present but its positional ordering relative to the figure is slightly off. No meaning impact.

The 4大経営資源 illustrative diagram (showing 会社 building connected to ヒト/モノ/カネ/情報 icons) is replaced by '![img-0.jpeg](img-0.jpeg)'. The diagram labels (ヒト, モノ, カネ, 情報) are however restated in the immediately following prose and the '4大経営資源' heading block, so no net content loss.

reviewer_notes: Content page Lesson 01-03 covering 経営資源, HRM (Human Resource Management), and OJT/Off-JT definitions. All prose captured correctly including ruby pronunciation text (エイチアールエム, オージェイティ, オフジェイティ) rendered as standalone lines — acceptable. Bold emphasis terms (HRM, OJT, Off-JT) and their English expansions all present. Page number '19' captured.
